title: Road to the Final
_teams: 32 knockout teams. Order matters: indexes 0-15 fill the Right half, 16-31 the Left half. Adjacent pairs (0,1),(2,3)… meet in the Round of 32.
_r32: The 16 Round-of-32 matches, keyed 'side:1:k' (side R/L, k=0..7). The two teams are teams[off+2k] vs teams[off+2k+1] (off=0 for R, 16 for L). Scheduled match: {date, time}. Played match: {score, winner, et?, pens?} — 'winner' is a team code and drives who advances/who's eliminated.
_schedule: Kickoff date/time for the inner rounds, keyed 'side:L:k' (L=2 R16, L=3 QF, L=4 SF). Add {score, winner} here the same way once these are played to light them up.
_groups: Final group-stage standings (finishing order 1-4) and matches, keyed A-L. Table row: {code,name,iso,w,d,l,gf,ga}; played=w+d+l, pts=3w+d, gd=gf-ga are derived. Match: {d,a,b,s} with score s in a-b order. Qualification (winner/runner-up/best third/eliminated) is derived from position + bracket membership.
